title: justicia bitarkarae
intro: Justicia bitarkarae, also known as the Justicia plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia bitarkarae include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Justicia bitarkarae can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots and leaves to make a decoction.
